title: FoundryPulse
subtitle: Real-time manufacturing performance monitoring
description: Real-time production visibility and KPIs — delivered through a fast, clean dashboard.

content.overview: FoundryPulse is a production monitoring platform built for a metal casting facility. It replaces manual data collection with live dashboards that show line status, output rates, and downtime — giving floor managers and leadership a shared, real-time picture of what's happening in the plant.
content.challenge: The facility tracked production on paper and spreadsheets. Shift reports were delayed, downtime causes were hard to pinpoint, and management had no real-time view of output. When issues occurred, it took hours to identify the root cause — and even longer to measure the impact.
content.solution: We built a React + TypeScript dashboard connected to the production floor via WebSocket. Data flows from machine signals into PostgreSQL, where it’s aggregated into live KPIs: OEE, cycle times, reject rates, and downtime breakdowns. The UI updates in real time and works on both desktop screens in the office and tablets on the floor.

features.title: Live production dashboard
features.description: Floor managers see line status, output counts, and cycle times updating in real time — no manual refresh needed

features.title: Downtime tracking & classification
features.description: Every stop is logged with a reason code. Weekly reports show exactly where time is lost and which causes repeat

features.title: Shift-based reporting
features.description: Automatic shift summaries replace handwritten logs — output, rejects, and downtime broken down per shift and per line

features.title: Role-based views
features.description: Operators see their line. Shift leads see the floor. Management sees plant-wide trends and comparisons
